data.title: Crypto Chaos: Inflation, LIBRA Scandal & Market Turmoil—What’s Next?
data.description:

The collapse of the LIBRA token, backed by Argentine President Javier Milei, has exposed the risks of speculative assets, eroding confidence in trendy cryptocurrencies. data.title: Somnia Launches Shannon Testnet After 1M+ TPS Benchmark
data.description:
Named after Claude Shannon, the father of information theory, this testnet provides a real-world environment. This new testnet from Somnia lets developers and users push blockchain scalability to new heights.
